case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JACQUELINE STEPNEY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT STEPNEY, JACQUELINE AKA JACQUELINE STEPHNEY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
MINUTES FOR JUL-14-2003 9:10 AM FOR DEPT 606

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-14-2003 - STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PLACED ON RECORD. JUDGMENT STAYED TO AUG-08-2003. JUDGE JOHN CONWAY, CLERK KAY PEEK, REPORTER MARY HINDS (606)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT STEPNEY, JACQUELINE AKA JACQUELINE STEPHNEY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT STEPNEY, JACQUELINE AKA JACQUELINE STEPHNEY
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: THOMPSON, BYRON CLAYTON SUBSTITUTED FOR WILLIAMS, CARL LOUIS AS ATTORNEY FOR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-14-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEPNEY, JACQUELINE AKA JACQUELINE STEPHNEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 155 HIGHLAND AVENUE $7,388.86 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,388.86, STAYED UNTIL AUG-08-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER PATTY VAN STEENBERGE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2003 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUL-14-2003 AT 9:10 AM IN DEPT. 606, JOHN J CONWAY.
